CustomField.label: Document Store
CustomField.description: Physical document storage location. Salesforce Files (ContentDocument) for Path 2 native extraction; nCino Document Manager (AccountDocument) for Path 1 nCino Automated Spreading.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select where the source file is stored. Use "nCino Document Manager" for documents uploaded via nCino (Path 1). Use "Salesforce Files" for documents processed through Salesforce-native extraction (Path 2).
